V-M-052.purpose: Verify that the official MTProxy data-plane is reachable through KrotPN public 443 and proves real Telegram protocol availability without leaking secrets.

commands.command-2: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_deploy_phase40_static.py -v

scenarios.scenario-1: Launcher builds official mtproto-proxy arguments from active 32-hex secrets and never prints full tg links or raw secrets.
scenarios.scenario-2: Runtime stats and health are private or loopback-only and do not expose user secrets.
scenarios.scenario-3: RU public 443 routes HTTPS ClientHello for krotpn.xyz to web while non-HTTPS MTProto traffic reaches DE official MTProxy.
scenarios.scenario-4: Live req_pq probe through the public KrotPN endpoint succeeds for the issued secure secret.
scenarios.scenario-5: Fallback/rollback keeps web HTTPS and admin 8443 available if the official MTProxy route is degraded.

failure-policy.policy-1: Any req_pq timeout keeps Phase-40 blocked-live.
failure-policy.policy-2: Any raw secret or full proxy link in logs or smoke output fails verification.
failure-policy.policy-3: Any regression in web HTTPS or admin 8443 fails release readiness.
